section_descriptions.international-journals: Scholar-synced journal papers from international venues.
section_descriptions.domestic-journals: Scholar-synced journal papers published in Korean venues.
section_descriptions.international-conferences: Scholar-synced international conference papers plus manually tracked upcoming records.
section_descriptions.domestic-conferences: Scholar-synced conference papers from Korean venues.

u-x6o8ySG0sC.display_title: SolarFlux Predictor: A Novel Deep Learning Approach for Photovoltaic Power Forecasting in South Korea
u-x6o8ySG0sC.summary: This paper proposes a deep-learning approach for photovoltaic power forecasting in South Korea with an emphasis on stable national-scale prediction performance.
u-x6o8ySG0sC.topic_copy: Deep-learning forecasting for photovoltaic power generation.

ufrVoPGSRksC.display_title: SolarNexus: A Deep Learning Framework for Adaptive Photovoltaic Power Generation Forecasting and Scalable Management
ufrVoPGSRksC.summary: This paper introduces an adaptive photovoltaic forecasting framework that connects plant-level prediction accuracy with scalable energy-management workflows.
ufrVoPGSRksC.topic_copy: Adaptive forecasting and scalable management for photovoltaic systems.

LkGwnXOMwfcC.display_title: TRACS-LLM: LLM-based Traffic Accident Criminal Sentencing Prediction Focusing on Imprisonment, Probation, and Fines
LkGwnXOMwfcC.summary: This paper studies traffic-accident sentencing prediction by combining legal text, structured case attributes, and language-model reasoning for imprisonment, probation, and fine outcomes.
LkGwnXOMwfcC.topic_copy: Language-model reasoning for traffic-accident sentencing outcomes.

5nxA0vEk-isC.display_title: Anticipatory Driving Maneuver for Safety and Comfort: Temporal Graph Cross Attention-Based Front Vehicle Trajectory Prediction
5nxA0vEk-isC.authors: Hyunsik Min, Gyeongseon Baek, Yeeun Kim, Byeongjoon Noh
5nxA0vEk-isC.summary: This paper presents a temporal graph cross-attention framework for front-vehicle trajectory prediction with an emphasis on anticipatory driving, passenger comfort, and safety support.
5nxA0vEk-isC.image_alt: Temporal graph cross attention trajectory prediction model diagram
5nxA0vEk-isC.topic_copy: Temporal graph cross attention for safer and more comfortable driving support.

hqOjcs7Dif8C.display_title: Anticipating Front-Side Vehicles' Maneuvers for Trustworthy Autonomous Driving
hqOjcs7Dif8C.authors: Hyunsik Min, Yeeun Kim, Jungryul Kim, Seongjin Lee, Byeongjoon Noh
hqOjcs7Dif8C.summary: This paper develops a TGCA-based front-side vehicle prediction framework for trustworthy autonomous driving and anticipatory maneuver understanding.
hqOjcs7Dif8C.topic_copy: Trajectory reasoning for safer and more reliable vehicle interaction.

WF5omc3nYNoC.display_title: Natural Language Processing-based Judgement Prediction System for Road Traffic Accidents: Focused on Text Information for Traffic Accident Situations
WF5omc3nYNoC.authors: Hyunsik Min, Junyeong Yun, Byeongjoon Noh
WF5omc3nYNoC.summary: This paper presents a judgment-prediction system for road-traffic accidents using textual descriptions of accident situations and legal context.
WF5omc3nYNoC.topic_copy: Judgment prediction from accident narratives and legal context.

roLk4NBRz8UC.display_title: Temporal Graph Cross Attention-Based Front-Side Vehicle Trajectory Prediction
roLk4NBRz8UC.display_venue: The 93rd Conference of Korean Society of Transportation
roLk4NBRz8UC.authors: Hyunsik Min, Yeeun Kim, Jungryul Kim, Seongjin Lee, Byeongjoon Noh
roLk4NBRz8UC.summary: This conference paper models front-side vehicle interactions as a spatiotemporal graph and uses cross-frame attention to improve maneuver-intent and trajectory estimation.
roLk4NBRz8UC.topic_copy: Graph-based front-vehicle prediction for anticipatory driving support.

Y0pCki6q_DkC.display_title: Development of a Model for Traffic Noise Recognition and Classification in Urban Environments
Y0pCki6q_DkC.display_venue: Proceedings of the Korea Society of Computer and Information Conference
Y0pCki6q_DkC.authors: Hyunsik Min, Byeongjoon Noh, Jiyoung Woo
Y0pCki6q_DkC.summary: This conference paper studies traffic-noise recognition and classification for urban environments with a focus on robust sound-pattern discrimination.
Y0pCki6q_DkC.topic_copy: Urban sound recognition for road-noise monitoring and classification.

0EnyYjriUFMC.display_title: Natural Language Processing-Based Road Traffic Accident Judgment Prediction System: Using Traffic-Accident Situation Text
0EnyYjriUFMC.display_venue: Conference of Korean Society of Transportation
0EnyYjriUFMC.authors: Hyunsik Min, Junyeong Yun, Byeongjoon Noh
0EnyYjriUFMC.summary: This conference paper studies road-traffic-accident judgment prediction with a focus on textual descriptions of accident situations.
0EnyYjriUFMC.topic_copy: Legal-text modeling for road-traffic judgment prediction.

W7OEmFMy1HYC.display_title: LLM-based Traffic Accident Sentencing Prediction System
W7OEmFMy1HYC.display_venue: Conference of The Korea Institute of Intelligent Transport Systems
W7OEmFMy1HYC.summary: This conference paper explores LLM-based prediction of traffic-accident sentencing outcomes from case descriptions and decision-related legal cues.
W7OEmFMy1HYC.topic_copy: Sentencing prediction with language models for traffic-accident cases.

2osOgNQ5qMEC.display_title: Natural Language Processing-based Judgement Prediction System for Road Traffic Accidents
2osOgNQ5qMEC.display_venue: Conference of The Korea Institute of Intelligent Transport Systems
2osOgNQ5qMEC.authors: Hyunsik Min, Junyeong Yun, Byeongjoon Noh
2osOgNQ5qMEC.summary: This conference paper presents an earlier judgment-prediction approach for road-traffic accidents based on textual descriptions of accident situations.
2osOgNQ5qMEC.topic_copy: Early legal-text modeling for road-traffic judgment prediction.

9yKSN-GCB0IC.display_title: Tooth Segmentation and Identification Method in Panoramic Radiographs Using Mask R-CNN
9yKSN-GCB0IC.summary: This conference paper presents a Mask R-CNN-based pipeline for tooth segmentation and identification in panoramic radiographic images.
9yKSN-GCB0IC.topic_copy: Segmentation and identification for panoramic dental imaging.

manual_records.display_title: Comfort-Centric Trajectory Prediction for Autonomous Driving via Temporal Graph Cross Attention
manual_records.summary: This scheduled conference paper extends the trajectory-prediction line toward comfort-aware autonomous-driving support through temporal graph cross attention.
manual_records.topic_copy: Comfort-aware prediction strategies for future driving systems.

manual_records.display_title: Theorising Service Routines through Ontological Granularity and Behavioural Sequencing
manual_records.display_venue: European Operations Management Association, The 2026 EurOMA Annual Conference
manual_records.authors: Hyunsik Min, Youngseok Thomas Choi, Changwon Park, Habin Lee, Byeongjoon Noh
manual_records.summary: This scheduled conference paper broadens the portfolio into operations management through a study of service routines, ontological granularity, and behavioral sequencing.
manual_records.topic_copy: Service-routine structure and sequencing in operations contexts.
